name: diff-scope
description: Understand completed local code changes with explanations, quizzes, and interactive microworlds.

interface.longDescription: Turn the completed local working-tree change into an evidence-based explanation, an auto-scored quiz, and a safe offline interactive microworld.
defaultPrompt: Explain the local change I just finished, then quiz me and make it explorable.
Teach me this change through its behavior, invariants, risks, and evidence.
Create a durable DiffScope bundle for this completed local change.
